Hit enemies from anywhere with your belly (B button)
Hit enemies from anywhere when you throw a rock (large rocks only)
Walk faster (when you're not carrying a rock)
Walk normal speed when you're carrying a large rock (you won't slow down)
Walk faster when you're carrying a large rock
Rocks don't sink in lava/mud/tar, but will disappear after 20 seconds
